description: Style NoteClassy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These formal trousers from indigo nation will go a long way in making you the best dressed man in the room. Made from the choicest of fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear or any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular.Product DetailsBlack pants with two front pockets, two back flap buttoned pockets, loops at the waist and a buttoned zipper Material and Care97% cotton and 3 spandexMachine or hand wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32') is wearing a size 32
